zh.Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, England: 英國爾布拉德利 白 馬爾帕斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Tabley於大約1320年出生在英國爾奧維 塔波時，她的父親William de Tabley31歲，母親Mary43歲。她於大約1340年與Thomas Daniel在英國爾塔波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1398年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, England: 英国爾布拉德利 白 馬爾帕斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Tabley于大约1320年出生在英国爾奧維 塔波时，她的父亲William de Tabley31岁，母亲Mary43岁。她于大约1340年与Thomas Daniel在英国爾塔波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1398年在她的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tabley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Over and Nether Tabley (Cheshire).

variants.name: Tapley
meanings: habitational name from Tapeley in Devon. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Tæppa + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’.
variant of Tabley, a habitational name from Over and Nether Tabley in Cheshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Tæbba + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Tabley was born about 1320, in Over Tabley, Cheshire, England, her father, William de Tabley, was 31 and her mother, Mary, was 43. She married Thomas Daniel about 1340, in Tabley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1398, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Tabley est née environ 1320, à Over Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Tabley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Daniel environ 1340, à Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1398, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Tabley um 1320 in Over Tabley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Tabley 31 und ihre Mutter Mary 43. Sie hat um 1340 in Tabley, Cheshire, England Thomas Daniel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1398 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Tabley è nata il circa 1320 nel Over Tabley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William de Tabley, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Daniel circa 1340, nel Tabley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1398, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Tableyが約1320年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー タブリーで生まれた時，父William de Tableyは31歳，母Maryは43歳であった。約1340年にイギリスチェシュアイアタブリーでThomas Danielと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1398年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Tabley(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 체실르 버 타블리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tabley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 영국 체실르 타블리에서 Thomas Daniel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Tabley nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Over Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Tabley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Daniel aproximadamente 1340, em Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1398, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Tabley родилась около 1320 г. в местности овир табли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Tabley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Daniel около 1340 г. в местности табли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1398 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Thomas Daniel aproximadamente 1340, en Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1398, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
